title: Ubiquiti UVC-AI-360 - Fisheye UniFi video camera, 5MP, 360 °, black
description: The Camera AI 360 (AI 360) is a pan-tilt-zoom (PTZ) camera that provides panoramic, overhead surveillance of heavily populated indoor and outdoor areas. The AI 360 streams sharp 1920x1920 video at a smooth 30 frames per second (FPS), and its built-in IR LEDs ensure that every frame is crystal clearâday or night. Equipped with a 5 MP CMOS sensor and an ultra-wide, 360 ° fisheye lens, the AI 360 can quickly detect finite details within its expansive coverage area and capture them with pristine… 5MP CMOS sensor, 1920 x 1920px resolution with 30 fps Ultra-wide, 360 ° fisheye lens Outdoor and indoor, IPX4-rated, weatherproof housing IK08-rated tamper resistance Built-in IR LEDs for clear nighttime surveillance Powering over PoE - 802.3af, max. power consumption 8,6 W Managed with the UniFi Protect application: Version 1.10.0 and later Device Material for attachment to the wall or ceiling Tool Protective dome
